actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour fileID 254571545 on GameObject '5- Box Sockets Interactors' matches script CheckElements (guid: 3bc2acd74545a4f1aa9eba6d8f72a530) with numberOfElements=3. Calling AddElementInSocket three times should make numberOfElementsInSocket == numberOfElements, which will Invoke UnityEvents: hideTaskDescription -> GameObject(1945735948).SetActive(false), showNextLevelUI -> GameObject(208823133).SetActive(true), unlock -> GameObject(157114427).SetActive(false).
